items.example: Pescatarians have a diet that includes fish, but no meat.
Vegans avoid any animal-related products, including dairy and eggs.
Vegetarians don't eat meat, but they do eat dairy products.
My sister is a pescatarian, so she eats fish but not meat.
A healthy diet isn't just about keeping the number of calories at a sensible level.
Eating too much fatty food can cause cholesterol to build up in your blood.
It's important to consume a variety of food types to get the nutrients we need.
I love to binge on unhealthy foods on the odd occasion.
When I'm in a hurry, I tend to grab a snack rather than eat a proper meal.
I avoid buying junk food like burgers and chips.
When buying fruit and veg, I try to buy things that are in season.
Strawberries taste bland when they are out of season.
I go for organic alternatives as I know they're natural and no chemicals have been used.
